title: Of Horne, A Combmaker.
content:
Horne sells to others teeth; but has not one
    To grace his own gums, or of box, or bone.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Of Horne, A Combmaker."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
